findings.title: Missing: Strict-Transport-Security
findings.detail: HSTS missing — forces HTTPS, prevents downgrade attacks
findings.remediation: Add 'Strict-Transport-Security' to your web server / reverse proxy config

findings.title: Missing: Content-Security-Policy
findings.detail: CSP missing — enables XSS and data injection attacks
findings.remediation: Add 'Content-Security-Policy' to your web server / reverse proxy config

findings.title: Missing: X-Content-Type-Options
findings.remediation: Add 'X-Content-Type-Options' to your web server / reverse proxy config

findings.title: Missing: Referrer-Policy
findings.remediation: Add 'Referrer-Policy' to your web server / reverse proxy config

findings.title: Missing: Permissions-Policy
findings.remediation: Add 'Permissions-Policy' to your web server / reverse proxy config

findings.title: Version disclosure: Server
findings.remediation: Remove or suppress the 'Server' response header
